name: first_principles
description: Deconstructs a problem down to its core, undeniable axiomatic truths and builds a solution up from scratch.

steps.prompt_injection: Identify and list all baseline assumptions. Strip away analogies, industry conventions, and 'best practices' until only raw physics, mathematical limits, or unarguable data remain.
Using only the verified truths established in the previous phase, engineer a novel optimization path without inheriting legacy design flaws.
